headline: Pentair (PNR) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: On today's call, we will provide details on our first quarter performance as outlined in this morning's press release. The non-GAAP financial measures provided should not be considered as a substitute for or superior to the measures of financial performance prepared in accordance with GAAP.

headline: Pentair Announces Leadership Transition for Pentair Pool
summary: LONDON, April 28, 2026--Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR), a leader in helping the world sustainably move, improve, and enjoy water life’s most essential resource, today announced that Jerome Pedretti, Executive Vice President and Chief Executive Officer of Pentair Pool, will depart the Company effective July 1, 2026. Pedretti concludes a distinguished career with Pentair spanning more than 20 years.

raw.headline: Pentair Announces Leadership Transition for Pentair Pool
raw.summary: LONDON, April 28, 2026--Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR), a leader in helping the world sustainably move, improve, and enjoy water life’s most essential resource, today announced that Jerome Pedretti, Executive Vice President and Chief Executive Officer of Pentair Pool, will depart the Company effective July 1, 2026. Pedretti concludes a distinguished career with Pentair spanning more than 20 years.

headline: Pentair Reports Strong First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: LONDON, April 28, 2026--Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR), a leader in helping the world sustainably move, improve and enjoy water, life’s most essential resource, today announced first quarter 2026 sales of $1,037 million. Sales were up 3 percent compared to sales for the same period last year. Excluding currency translation, acquisitions and divestitures, core sales grew 1 percent in the first quarter.
